def positive_celery_task_reads_env_per_invocation():
    rule_id = "celery_task_reads_env_per_invocation"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Celery task bodies repeatedly read environment configuration instead of using startup-time bootstrap."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
